data.content: Shipment completed. Merged origin/codex/web-ui-diagnostics-redo into a clean shipment branch from origin/main, producing merge commit a72e88c47757, and pushed that merged head to origin/main. Re-ran bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build on the merged main worktree before push; all passed. GitHub reports no combined-status checks for commit a72e88c47757, so there were no remote CI statuses to wait on.
